5	\cdots (2n-1) < \left( \frac{2n+1}{e} \right)^{\frac{2n+1}{2}}.
6	\]

input.content:
import Mathlib

open Real Finset

theorem putnam_1996_b2 (n : ℕ) (hn : n ≥ 1) :
    ((2 * (n : ℝ) - 1) / Real.exp 1) ^ ((2 * (n : ℝ) - 1) / 2) <
      (∏ k ∈ Finset.range n, ((2 * k + 1 : ℕ) : ℝ)) ∧
    (∏ k ∈ Finset.range n, ((2 * k + 1 : ℕ) : ℝ)) <
      ((2 * (n : ℝ) + 1) / Real.exp 1) ^ ((2 * (n : ℝ) + 1) / 2) := by
  sorry
